education.details: 2012, ~800 training hours including Medical Terminology and Anatomy & Physiology

skills_and_achievements: Vital signs, injections (IM/ID/Sub-Q/Z-track), phlebotomy (butterfly, vacutainer, syringe, capillary), ultrasound procedures, exam room setup/sterilization, patient education, EMR documentation, ICD-9/CPT familiarity, scheduling, insurance and co-pays, Microsoft Office; classroom readiness, early literacy/numeracy, arts activities, child supervision and safety.
